testcase.name: test_checkout

failure.message: Exception during checkout: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.cssSelector: #cart table.table-bordered, but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":"#cart table.table-bordered"}.
